content: I love how active this server is :heart:
Yeah I was thinking today that I feel so connected to the community now! Even though I don't log that often :) but it still is pleasant
@Joe Moeller Same! Only "bad" thing is that I woke up to ~400 new messages and it takes forever to go through them :D.

I spend whole mornings catching up, but that's just indicative of how much interesting content is showing up here :rolling_on_the_floor_laughing: If people start taking me up on all of my "I would be genuinely interested in working on this" comments, I might be in trouble though haha
My suggestion is to focus on just a few topics you care about, and for all the other stuff you are subscribed to just skim

we're more than 800 people here and only a tiny fraction of us is active atm, and it already takes a lot of time to go through the messages when you wake up, clearly keeping track of everything is not going to be feasible :frown:
Right, I regularly mute topics when I find myself losing interest. It's simply necessary.
